name: Tomato Lace Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1/4 cup chopped green onion
1 tsp butter or margarine
1 cup peeled, seeded, and coarsely chopped tomatoes
3/4 cup shredded swiss cheese (3 oz)
2 tablespoons grated parmesan cheese
3 eggs
1 cup evaporated skim milk
1/2 cup low-fat cottage cheese
1 tsp Italian mixed herbs, or 1/2 teaspoon oregano and 1/2 teaspoon basil
1/4 tsp salt
1/8 tsp coarsely ground pepper
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees.
2. In a bowl, combine rice, egg, and parmesan.
3. Press firmly into a deep (10-inch) quiche dish or pie pan to form a crust.
4. Bake for 3 minutes. Remove from the oven.
5. Reduce the oven temperature to 350 degrees.
6. In a skillet, sauté onion in butter, stirring until onion is soft. Remove from heat. Stir in tomatoes and cheeses. Spoon the mixture into the rice crust.
7. In a large bowl, beat together the remaining ingredients. Pour the mixture into the rice crust.
8. Bake for 35 minutes or until just set.
9. Let stand 5 minutes, then slice to serve.
